in_one_sentence: The citation-obsessed synthesizer who never speaks without a source.
when_to_use: Real-time news/facts research, verifying claims with citations, current event analysis.
when_not_to_use: Private data analysis or tasks where the web is irrelevant.

key_differentiators.context_handling: Seamlessly blends web-search results into context.
key_differentiators.truth_vs_speed: High verifiable truth, medium synthesis speed.
key_differentiators.product_vs_model: The leader in AI-powered search productization.
